# Franco Riottini Depetris

> Personal academic website of Franco Riottini Depetris (Economics PhD student at the University of Michigan). Main topics: international economics, trade, firm dynamics, productivity, education, and applied machine learning/LLMs in economics. Blog content is mostly in Spanish.

Use canonical website URLs for user-facing navigation. For model ingestion and parsing, prefer the raw Markdown sources listed below.

This file intentionally includes only publicly shareable resources and excludes confidential/unpublished materials.

Last updated: 2026-02-23

## Main

- [Bio / Home](https://francoriottini.github.io/): Main profile, research interests, background, and contact information.
- [CV](https://francoriottini.github.io/cv/): Academic background, experience, skills, and CV download links.
- [Publications](https://francoriottini.github.io/publications/): Publications and work-in-progress research.
- [Teaching](https://francoriottini.github.io/teaching/): Teaching history and course roles.
- [PhD Notes](https://francoriottini.github.io/phd-notes/): Organized course notes (PDF/TEX) by semester and subject.
- [Blog](https://francoriottini.github.io/blog/): Essays and posts, mainly in Spanish.

## Key Research Items

- [Do Ambassadors Matter? The effect of ambassadors on trade promotion](https://francoriottini.github.io/publication/2024-02-01-Do-Ambassadors-Matter): Master thesis (trade promotion and economic diplomacy).
- [Automatic Product Classification in International Trade: Machine Learning and Large Language Models](https://francoriottini.github.io/publication/2024-08-30-Automatic-Product-Classification-in-International-Trade): Journal/research article on ML/LLM classification in trade.
- [The Value of Organic Certifications](https://francoriottini.github.io/publication/2024-04-28-WIP): Work in progress on certification effects in agricultural exports.

## Key Blog Posts

- [An Incomplete Tought About Justice](https://francoriottini.github.io/posts/2025/03/Tought-About-Justice/): Reflection on justice and Rawlsian ideas.
- [Nativos de IA](https://francoriottini.github.io/posts/2025/06/AI-native/): Essay on AI-native generations and labor market adaptation.

## Files and Documents

- [CV PDF (English)](https://francoriottini.github.io/files/CV_Riottini_Franco_English.pdf)
- [Master Thesis PDF](https://francoriottini.github.io/files/Riottini%20Depetris%20%282024%29.pdf)
- [Trade Classification Paper PDF](https://francoriottini.github.io/files/Marra%2C%20Riottini%2C%20Volpe%20%282023%29.pdf)
